extortion.description: Goldair Handling Overview Metrics www.goldair-handling.gr  This company has 72 hours before we publish 1TB of personal data.  Goldair Handling Goldair Handling is a leading provider of ground handling services operating in Greece, Cyprus, Bulgaria, India, and Serbia. The company employs more than 5,000 qualified specialists who have successfully serviced more than 160,000 flights at 36 airports. The company focuses on providing customized services tailored to the needs of its business partners, with a special emphasis on corporate social responsibility and sustainable development. Goldair Handling is committed to innovation and progressive thinking in the aviation industry.  Goldair Cargo Greece Headquarters: Tessi Rikya, Aspropyrgos, Greece Phone number: +30 2111804200 Website: www.goldair-cargo.com Revenue: $190.2 million Employees: 201-500 Goldair Cargo, part of the Goldair Group founded in 1987, is a leading international freight forwarding and logistics company based in Greece. The company offers a wide range of high-quality services, including third-party logistics (3PL), road, air, and sea transport, relying on an extensive network of partners. With over 35 years of experience, Goldair Cargo strives to provide reliable and efficient logistics solutions tailored to the needs of its customers. Its focus on sustainable development and corporate social responsibility further strengthens its reputation in the logistics industry. _______________________
